sufficient. That is why the ancients have laid down that the
life of an astrologer should be an exemplar in every respect to
the populace. So the predictions of an astrologer would be
correct to that extent to which he is able to attune himself to the
Sacred Law. This gives the reason why some predictions are
fulfilled while others are falsified or partially fulfilled.
When we look at a horoscope and study the various kinds of
strength of the planets and the ascendant, we would be able to
assess the nature and strength of the merits and demerits of the
subject whose effects he or she has to reap in this life. Now
comes the question as to when the person is likely to experience
the effects of his good Karmas or deeds as well as those of his
bad ones. This is called the method of timing certain events in
the life of an individual. But the difficulty is that there are
several methods prevalent in different parts of India and the
